assumption: Working 146-card segmentation seed generated from a broad English phonics progression because the exact official ordered 146-card deck was not present in the uploaded specification.
sourceNote: The uploaded background specification confirms a fixed dataset of about 146 cards and a seed-JSON-first architecture, but it does not include the full ordered 146-sound list. See fileciteturn1file1 and fileciteturn1file3.

globalRules.pairModel: 5 visits per sound, 2 words per visit
globalRules.wordAdvanceRule: Unlock the next pair only after the current pair is passed.
globalRules.pairPassRule: Pass the pair when both words are correct within the same active pair cycle.

fallbackRule.onFirstError: Keep the same pair active and push the failed word to the end of the current mini-queue after at least two other cards.
fallbackRule.onSecondErrorInSamePair: Reopen the previous passed pair for one review cycle before allowing a new pair.
fallbackRule.onThirdErrorInSameSoundWindow: Mark the sound as fragile and schedule its next pair only after one easier review pair from an older sound.

globalRules.completionRule: A sound is complete when all 5 visit pairs have been passed.
